rationale: This is a licensed anime IP static ad (Dragon Ball Z Dokkan Battle) — completely off-brand for Flip & Dive 3D, which is a minimalist physics hypercasual with no anime, combat, or energy-blast vocabulary. Mechanic fit is near zero: there's no jumping/diving/timing read, just a charged-pose CTA, and we obviously can't borrow Goku's likeness. Only marginal audience overlap via broad young-male casual gamers, but the IP-dependent hook is non-replicable and would mislead installers — do not pursue.
